description: Create a CJIS Audit Logger in Talon at C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\cjis_audit\ that monitors application usage for 'notepad.exe', 'mspaint.exe', and 'wordpad.exe' (case-insensitive). The system must log application activation and deactivation events to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\cjis_audit_log.csv using the format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS,EVENT_TYPE,APP_NAME. Additionally, implement a custom Talon action user.audit_log_note(note: str) that appends manual entries to the same CSV in the format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS,MANUAL_NOTE,note. Map the voice command "audit note <user.text>" to this action in a corresponding .talon file. Ensure file I/O operations are efficient to prevent the log file from remaining locked.
